Requirement: POST /api/auth/token/ with valid credentials returns 200 and token
POST /api/auth/token/ with invalid credentials returns 400
GET /api/books/ without token returns 401
GET /api/books/ with valid token returns 200 and list payload
GET /api/books/<id>/ with valid token returns correct book fields
GET /api/books/<id>/ for non-existent id returns 404
GET /api/books/?search=<term> returns filtered results
GET /api/authors/ with valid token returns 200 and list payload
GET /api/authors/<id>/ with valid token returns correct author fields
GET /api/book-instances/ with valid token returns 200 and list payload
GET /api/book-instances/<id>/ with valid token returns correct fields including is_overdue
GET /api/book-instances/?status=a returns only available instances
GET /api/genres/ with valid token returns 200 and list payload
GET /api/genres/<id>/ with valid token returns correct genre fields
GET /api/languages/ with valid token returns 200 and list payload
GET /api/languages/<id>/ with valid token returns correct language fields
GET /api/stats/ with valid token returns 200 and all expected count keys
GET /api/stats/ without token returns 401
GET /catalog/books/?q=<term> filters books by title keyword
POST /catalog/bookinstance/<uuid>/borrow/ redirects unauthenticated users to login
Authenticated member can borrow available copy and becomes borrower
Borrow attempt for unavailable copy is rejected with feedback message
Only user with can_mark_returned permission can access return endpoint
Librarian return action sets status to available and clears borrower and due date
Successful borrow action shows user-facing flash message
Successful return action shows librarian-facing flash message
BookInstance.is_overdue returns True when due_back is in the past
BookInstance.is_overdue returns False when due_back is today or null
Renewal form rejects dates earlier than today
Renewal form rejects dates beyond today plus four weeks
Renewal form accepts today and four-week boundary dates
Borrow service marks available copy on loan with borrower and due date
Borrow service rejects unavailable copies
Return service resets status borrower and due date for on-loan copy
